PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?result
WHERE
{
  ?result pv:hasCategory <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/prod-cat-Potentiometer> .
  ?result pv:width_mm ?width_mm .
  ?result pv:depth_mm ?depth_mm .
  ?result pv:height_mm ?height_mm .
  BIND(?width_mm * ?depth_mm * ?height_mm as ?volume)
}
ORDER BY ASC(?volume)
LIMIT 1

PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?result
WHERE
{
  ?result pv:hasCategory <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/prod-cat-Coil> .
  ?result pv:width_mm ?width_mm .
  ?result pv:depth_mm ?depth_mm .
  ?result pv:height_mm ?height_mm .
  ?result pv:weight_g ?weight_g .
  BIND(?width_mm * ?depth_mm * ?height_mm / 1000000000 AS ?volume_m3)
  BIND(?weight_g / 1000 AS ?weight_kg)
  BIND(?weight_kg / ?volume_m3 AS ?density)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?density)
LIMIT 1

PREFIX prodi: <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

ASK
WHERE {
  { # all BOMs with parts from russia
    SELECT ?bom
    WHERE {
      ?bom pv:hasBomPart ?bomPart .
      ?bomPart pv:hasPart ?hw .
      ?hw pv:hasSupplier ?suppl .
      ?suppl pv:addressCountry ?country .
      FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(?country), LCASE("Russia")))
    }
  }

  # services eligible for parts associated with these BOMs?
  ?s a pv:Service .
  ?s pv:eligibleFor ?hw .
  ?bom pv:hasBomPart ?bomPart .
  ?bomPart pv:hasPart ?hw .
}
generated:
PREFIX : <http://example.org/>

SELECT ?service
WHERE {
    ?bom :hasPart ?part .
    ?part :isSourcedFrom :russia .
    ?service :appliesTo ?bom .
}

golden:
PREFIX prodi: <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?cat ?name
WHERE {
  ?hw a pv:Hardware ;
    pv:hasCategory ?cat .
  ?cat pv:name ?name .
}
GROUP BY ?cat ?name
ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(*))
LIMIT 3

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX prodi: <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?bom (COUNT(?part) AS ?partCount) (SUM(?qty) AS ?totalQty)
WHERE {
  ?bom a pv:BillOfMaterial ;
    pv:hasBomPart ?part .
  ?part pv:quantity ?qty_ .
  BIND(xsd:int(?qty_) AS ?qty)
}
GROUP BY ?bom
HAVING (SUM(?qty) > 600)
ORDER BY DESC(SUM(?qty))

generated:
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?width ?height WHERE {
    ?item a http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/HardwareItem .
    ?item http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/width_mm ?width .
    ?item http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/height_mm ?height .
    FILTER (?width > ?height && ?depth < "50"^^xsd:integer)
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX bom: <http://example.org/bom#>  # Replace with actual BOM namespace

SELECT ?bom_id (AVG(?unit_cost) AS ?average_unit_cost)
WHERE {
  ?bom a bom:BillOfMaterial .
  ?bom bom:hasPart ?part .
  ?part rdf:type bom:HardwarePart .
  ?part bom:unitCost ?unit_cost .
}
GROUP BY ?bom_id
ORDER BY DESC(?average_unit_cost)
LIMIT 1

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema: <http://schema.org/>

SELECT ?department (COUNT(?product) AS ?productCount)
WHERE {
  ?department rdf:type schema:Department .
  ?department schema:responsibleFor ?product .
  ?product rdf:type schema:Product .
}
GROUP BY ?department
ORDER BY DESC(?productCount)
LIMIT 1
